Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Abe Lampart, Esq. 415-274-0999 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER GREGORY BREEN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant to CCP section 1285 et seq. and for Entry of Judgment.

Petitioner Breen's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order and judgment.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned Order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
